Badges.empty_description: Take the placement test to discover your proficiency.
Badges.en_A1_desc: You can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and basic phrases.
Badges.en_A1_quote: The book is on the table. You are welcome. Very happy.
Badges.en_A2_desc: You understand isolated phrases and frequent expressions related to areas of immediate relevance.
Badges.en_A2_quote: In my house in Miami, Chris Brown said: Naldo, your style is incredible!
Badges.en_B1_desc: You are able to handle most situations that may arise during a trip to a place where the language is spoken.
Badges.en_B1_quote: I'm very happy for the goals. Prruuuu!
Badges.en_B2_desc: You understand the main ideas of complex texts on concrete and abstract topics.
Badges.en_B2_quote: It's true! I love to speak with people, even with my accent.
Badges.en_C1_desc: You understand a wide spectrum of long and demanding texts, recognizing implicit meanings.
Badges.en_C1_quote: Don't let the samba die. Fluency is the soul of the business.
Badges.en_C2_desc: You understand effortlessly virtually everything you hear or read.
Badges.en_C2_quote: Fluent and funny. The perfect combination for the top.
Badges.pt_A1_desc: Confident with zero vocabulary. Says 'obrigado' with an impossible accent and thinks 'saudade' is a typical dish.
Badges.pt_A1_quote: I'm the best at Portuguese. I am fluent. Boa… tarde? See? Fluent.
Badges.pt_A2_desc: Enthusiastic, hardworking, understands half of everything. Orders food at a restaurant but gets something completely different.
Badges.pt_A2_quote: Are you ready, kids? Porque eu aprendi como pedir… pão de queijo!
Badges.pt_B1_desc: Not the fastest, but handles any situation. Follows the novela and can explain what happened in the last episode.
Badges.pt_B1_quote: Mamãe always said Portuguese is like a box of chocolates — você nunca sabe o que vai falar.
Badges.pt_B2_desc: Speaks with an accent but everyone understands. Gets jokes, sarcasm and wins over any Brazilian in conversation.
Badges.pt_B2_quote: Como você está? How YOU doin'? — works in both languages, amigo.
Badges.pt_C1_desc: Precise, calm and commanding. Brazilians think you're from another state, not another country. Uses subjunctive for fun.
Badges.pt_C1_quote: Eu não sou em perigo, Skyler. Eu SOU o perigo. E meu português é impecável.
Badges.pt_C2_desc: Reads Machado de Assis for pleasure. Understands a Gaúcho and a Nordestino in the same conversation.
Badges.pt_C2_quote: And so he learned the Portuguese language — not as a foreigner, but as a soul that always knew the way.
Badges.vault_desc_en: Meet the icons that represent each stage of your fluency in English.
Badges.vault_desc_generic: See who you become at each stage of your journey in {language}.
Badges.vault_desc_pt: See who you become at each stage of your journey in Portuguese.

ProgressHero.description: Keep it up! Every class and practice session brings you closer to fluency.
ProgressHero.title: Your Progress

Comparison.description: You've tried learning with apps and gave up. Or you took generic classes that went nowhere. We know — and we've created something entirely different.

apps.problems: Repetitive exercises,Memorizing isolated words,No real follow-up,90% give up halfway
apps.solutions: Learn how you learned Portuguese,No forced memorization,Dedicated tutor who knows you,Anti-dropout planning
apps.title: Apps (Duolingo, Babbel)

marketplaces.problems: Each class is isolated,No structured curriculum,You have to manage everything
marketplaces.solutions: Plan made 100% for you,Schedule based on your objectives,We manage your learning
marketplaces.title: Marketplaces (Preply, iTalki)

traditional.problems: Fixed-pace classes,Generic content for everyone,Inflexible schedules
traditional.solutions: Pace adapted to you,Themes you enjoy,Schedules that work for you
traditional.title: Traditional Schools

Comparison.title: Why is Fluency Lab different?

brand.description: Transforming language learning into a natural, human experience adapted to your pace.

newsletter.description: Receive exclusive content and news about the natural method.
newsletter.title: Ready for fluency?

LandingPage.heroSubtitle:
A platform that follows
every step of your progress. Simple as that.

complete.description: Everything you learn is recorded on our platform: mastered vocabulary, studied topics, evolution over time. Plus: there are recorded video lessons for you to review any subject whenever you want.
complete.subtitle: See your progress happening
complete.title: Complete Platform

dedicated.description: It's not just 'book a class and goodbye'. Your tutor knows you, remembers your goals, adjusts the plan when needed, and provides a thought-out service to keep you going. It's like having a personal trainer for the language.
dedicated.subtitle: We don't let you give up
dedicated.title: Dedicated Tutors

natural.description: Do you know how you learned your first language? Without memorizing conjugations and vocabulary lists. Our method is the same: you acquire the language naturally, through real conversations, context, and immersion. No boring flashcards.
natural.subtitle: Learn without memorizing
natural.title: Natural Method

personalized.description: No 'standard' classes here. We build a unique study plan for you: based on your current level, your goals (travel? work? exam?), your deadlines, and even the subjects you enjoy. Want to learn English talking about technology? Let's go.
personalized.subtitle: Your schedule, your goals
personalized.title: Personalized Plan

LandingPage.subtitle: Personalized classes with dedicated tutors, natural method without rote memorization.

Team.cta: I want to book a trial lesson
Team.description: Dedicated tutors ready to personalize your learning journey based on your real goals. We aren't just teachers, we are partners in your evolution.

ana.bio: Neuro-linguistics specialist with 10 years of experience in adaptive teaching.
ana.name: Ana Silva

lucas.bio: Ensures your study plan is always aligned with your routine.
lucas.name: Lucas Oliveira

mark.bio: London native, focused on Business English and corporate communication.
mark.name: Mark Miller

sofia.bio: Argentine journalist who teaches through culture and current events.
sofia.name: Sofia Martinez

Team.title: Meet our team of <primary>professionals</primary>

LandingPage.title: Learn a language for real, without giving up halfway
